Container.Name: broccoli_norns-desktop
Container.Overview: norns on Docker for browser-based testing. Exposes maiden on 5000, norns screen at 8889, and audio stream at 8000/radio.mp3. Requires /dev/snd and realtime container permissions for audio. On startup, the wrapper initializes `/home/we/dust` (`code`, `data`, `audio`, `jackdrc`), verifies write access for user `we` (UID/GID 1000), and fails with a clear message if permissions are incorrect. If no Jackd Config Override file is mounted, startup automatically creates `/etc/jackdrc` with the dummy driver — no manual jackdrc setup required.
Container.PostArgs: -lc "set -eu; echo '[startup] norns dust initialization starting'; sudo mkdir -p /home/we/dust/code /home/we/dust/data /home/we/dust/audio /home/we/dust/jackdrc; if ! sudo chown -R we:we /home/we/dust; then echo '[startup] ERROR: unable to chown /home/we/dust to we:we. Check Unraid appdata ownership/permissions for UID/GID 1000.'; exit 1; fi; if ! sh -c 'test -w /home/we/dust && test -w /home/we/dust/code && test -w /home/we/dust/data && test -w /home/we/dust/audio && test -w /home/we/dust/jackdrc'; then echo '[startup] ERROR: /home/we/dust is not writable by user we (UID/GID 1000). Fix host mount permissions and restart.'; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -s /etc/jackdrc ]; then echo '/usr/bin/jackd -R -P 95 -d dummy -p 1024' | sudo tee /etc/jackdrc > /dev/null; echo '[startup] No jackdrc supplied; created default /etc/jackdrc with dummy driver. Set Jackd Config Override to use real audio hardware.'; fi; if [ -f /home/we/norns/lua/core/mods.lua ]; then perl -0pi -e 's/for\\s+name,\\s+details\\s+in\\s+pairs\\(\\s*scan\\s*\\)\\s+do/for name, details in pairs(scan or {}) do/' /home/we/norns/lua/core/mods.lua; fi; if [ -f /home/we/norns/lua/core/startup.lua ]; then perl -0pi -e 's/mods\\.load\\(\\s*mods\\.scan\\(\\)\\s*,\\s*true\\s*\\)/mods.load(mods.scan() or {}, true)/' /home/we/norns/lua/core/startup.lua; fi; echo '[startup] norns dust initialization complete'; exec tmuxp load norns"

Config.Name: Audio Stream Port
Config.Description: Container Port: 8000 - MP3 audio stream at /radio.mp3

Config.Name: Dust AppData
Config.Description: Persistent norns data/scripts. Startup creates code/data/audio/jackdrc and verifies write access for user we (UID/GID 1000).

Config.Name: Jackd Config Override
Config.Description: Optional host file bind-mounted over /etc/jackdrc. Leave blank to use the auto-created dummy driver default (/usr/bin/jackd -R -P 95 -d dummy -p 1024). Only set this if you have real audio hardware and want a custom ALSA jackd command. Create the host file first so Docker does not create a directory.
